Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-elalto-merge-java/3/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-elalto-merge-java/3/ )

There are test failures. Please look in the log to identify them. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-elalto-merge-java/3/ )
